title: Epoch-0 deposits can receive a multiplier above 100% if deployment predates the configured start by over one epoch
reason: Code supports the math, but the issue is only reachable for deployments made more than one epoch before the fixed `epoch1Start` of June 21, 2021. For any deployment on or after that date, `getCurrentEpoch()` is never 0, so this is not a live or forward-looking reportable issue for the current codebase.
